title: melica subflava
intro: Melica subflava, also known as yellow melick, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Melica subflava include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Melica subflava include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
